zh.lifeSummary: 當William 5th Baron la Zouche of Haryngworth於1403年5月10日出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯時，他的父親William la Zouche Fourth Baron Zouche of Harringworth51歲，母親Elizabeth Crosse26歲。他和Alice Saint Maur至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1462年12月25日在英國諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯享年59歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾奧可奧福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William 5th Baron la Zouche of Haryngworth于1403年5月10日出生在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯时，他的父亲William la Zouche Fourth Baron Zouche of Harringworth51岁，母亲Elizabeth Crosse26岁。他和Alice Saint Maur至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1462年12月25日在英国諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯享年59岁，埋葬在英国英格兰斯塔福爾奧可奧福。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When William 5th Baron la Zouche of Haryngworth was born on 10 May 1403, in Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William la Zouche Fourth Baron Zouche of Harringworth, was 51 and his mother, Elizabeth Crosse, was 26. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Alice Saint Maur. He died on 25 December 1462, in Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 59, and was buried in Okeover, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William 5th Baron la Zouche of Haryngworth est né le 10 mai 1403, à Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William la Zouche Fourth Baron Zouche of Harringworth, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Crosse, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Alice Saint Maur. Il est décédé le 25 décembre 1462, à Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Okeover, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William 5th Baron la Zouche of Haryngworth am 10. Mai 1403 in Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William la Zouche Fourth Baron Zouche of Harringworth 51 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Crosse 26. Er hatte mit Alice Saint Maur mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 25. Dezember 1462 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England und wurde in Okeover, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William 5th Baron la Zouche of Haryngworth è nato il il 10 maggio 1403 nel Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William la Zouche Fourth Baron Zouche of Harringworth, aveva 51 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Crosse, aveva 26 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Alice Saint Maur. Morì il 25 dicembre 1462, nel Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Okeover, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England: イギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアハーリングウオルス
ja.lifeSummary: William 5th Baron la Zouche of Haryngworthが1403年5月10日にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアハーリングウオルスで生まれた時，父William la Zouche Fourth Baron Zouche of Harringworthは51歳，母Elizabeth Crosseは26歳であった。彼はAlice Saint Maurとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1462年12月25日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアハーリングウオルスで59歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアオケオバーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William 5th Baron la Zouche of Haryngworth(이)가 1403년 5월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 해링워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William la Zouche Fourth Baron Zouche of Harringworth(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Crosse(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Alice Saint Maur(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1462년 12월 25일 영국 노르섬프토실르 해링워스에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 오케오버에 묻혔다.

pt.1403-05-10–25 December 1462: 10 de maio de 1403–25 de dezembro de 1462
pt.lifeSummary: Quando William 5th Baron la Zouche of Haryngworth nasceu em 10 de maio de 1403, em Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William la Zouche Fourth Baron Zouche of Harringworth, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Crosse, tinha 26 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Alice Saint Maur. Ele faleceu em 25 de dezembro de 1462, em Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Okeover, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William 5th Baron la Zouche of Haryngworth родился 10 мая 1403 г. в местности харрингворт, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William la Zouche Fourth Baron Zouche of Harringworth было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Crosse, 26. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Alice Saint Maur. Он умер 25 декабря 1462 г. в местности харрингворт, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности океовир, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.1403-05-10–25 December 1462: 10 de mayo de 1403–25 de diciembre de 1462
es.lifeSummary: Cuando William 5th Baron la Zouche of Haryngworth nació el 10 de mayo de 1403, en Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William la Zouche Fourth Baron Zouche of Harringworth, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Crosse, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Alice Saint Maur. Murió el 25 de diciembre de 1462, en Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Okeover, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
